subtitle.zh: 市场情报主入口 · 报告浏览与分发
subtitle.en: Main portal · Report browsing and distribution

title.zh: 集中查看各市场情报报告与最新机会判断
title.en: Centralized access to market intelligence reports and current opportunity reads

summary.zh: 这里是整套系统的浏览入口。你可以在这里查看不同市场的历史报告、最新分析、重点方向与后续扩展中的市场。每份报告都基于统一模板生成，便于长期积累、横向比较与快速调用。
summary.en: This is the browsing entry point for the full intelligence system. Use it to access historical reports, latest market reads, priority opportunity directions, and future market expansions. Each report is generated from the same reporting template for long-term accumulation, comparison, and reuse.

summary.zh: 4月美国机会更偏向春季刚需，重点在虫害控制、园艺维护、整理和补水类方向。
summary.en: US April opportunities lean toward spring necessity, led by pest control, garden maintenance, organization, and hydration.

summary.zh: 美国穿戴甲市场成熟度高、内容适配强、供给丰富，当前竞争重点在审美更新速度、可重复佩戴价值表达和品牌化包装。
summary.en: The US press-on nails market is mature, content-friendly, and supply-rich, with competition centered on aesthetic refresh speed, reusable value positioning, and brand-led packaging.

highlight.zh: 成熟市场，竞争在表达与体验
highlight.en: Mature market, competition is in positioning and experience

recommendedActions.zh: 优先关注可重复佩戴套装与主题设计更新频率
recommendedActions.en: Prioritize reusable kits and cadence of themed design refreshes

recommendedActions.zh: 同步比较大众零售表达和 TikTok 内容表达差异
recommendedActions.en: Compare mass-retail positioning with TikTok-native creative language

watchReason.zh: 美国是穿戴甲最成熟的验证市场，适合作为基准盘持续跟踪
watchReason.en: The US is the most mature validation market for press-on nails and should be tracked as a benchmark

summary.zh: 澳洲3月需求偏换季与日常整理，适合从收纳、厨房、宠物和户外轻升级小件切入。
summary.en: Australia March demand favored seasonal reset and daily organization, with opportunities in organization, kitchen, pet, and light outdoor goods.

summary.zh: 澳洲穿戴甲市场不像美国那么拥挤，但已有稳定消费基础，更适合从中低复杂度、日常佩戴和便利性表达切入。
summary.en: Australia is less crowded than the US but already has stable consumer demand, making it more suitable for everyday wear and convenience-led positioning with lower execution complexity.

highlight.zh: 中度成熟，适合轻量切入
highlight.en: Moderately mature and suitable for lighter entry

recommendedActions.zh: 先看日常短中款和基础便利性卖点
recommendedActions.en: Start with short-medium everyday sets and convenience-led messaging

recommendedActions.zh: 优先验证大众零售可接受价格带
recommendedActions.en: Validate mainstream retail-acceptable price bands first

watchReason.zh: 市场基础存在，但供给密度和品牌成熟度仍需持续观察
watchReason.en: The market base exists, but supply depth and brand maturity still need monitoring

title.zh: 东南亚穿戴甲市场现状
title.en: Southeast Asia Press-On Nails Market Status

summary.zh: 东南亚穿戴甲市场更偏社媒驱动和价格敏感型机会，适合从高内容适配、低决策门槛和主题化上新切入。
summary.en: Southeast Asia leans more toward social-driven and price-sensitive opportunity, making it suitable for content-friendly, low-friction, and themed-refresh entry strategies.

highlight.en: Strong social fit with higher price sensitivity

recommendedActions.zh: 优先关注 TikTok / 社媒内容友好的主题款和轻量套装
recommendedActions.en: Prioritize themed sets and light kits that perform well in TikTok and social content

recommendedActions.zh: 同步压测价格敏感度与基础品质接受度
recommendedActions.en: Stress-test price sensitivity alongside minimum acceptable quality

watchReason.zh: 内容势能强，但区域差异大，需持续分国观察
watchReason.en: Content momentum is strong, but country-level variation remains large and should be tracked continuously

summary.zh: 全球穿戴甲机会更偏设计驱动与便利性驱动，重点在可重复佩戴、定制设计和工具配套。
summary.en: Global press-on nail opportunity is driven by design and convenience, with priority in reusable sets, custom styles, and accessory bundles.

recommendedActions.zh: 优先测试可重复佩戴套装与工具配套组合
recommendedActions.en: Test reusable kits together with accessory bundles first

recommendedActions.zh: 先跑设计主题验证，再决定是否扩品牌化表达
recommendedActions.en: Validate design themes before expanding into stronger brand positioning

watchReason.zh: 供给多、内容强，适合持续监控平台反应
watchReason.en: Supply is deep and content fit is strong, so platform response should be monitored continuously

summary.zh: DIY 花艺包值得做，但更适合走体验型、礼盒型和场景型商品路线，而不是普通散装材料包。
summary.en: DIY floral kits are worth pursuing, but the stronger route is experience-led, giftable, and scenario-based positioning rather than plain loose-material bundles.

highlight.zh: 卖的是完成感，不只是材料

recommendedActions.zh: 先定义基础桌花包、节庆礼盒包和家居风格包 3 个起步 SKU
recommendedActions.en: Define three starter SKUs: table kit, seasonal gift kit, and home-style kit

recommendedActions.zh: 优先压测教程清晰度和成品可复制性
recommendedActions.en: Stress-test guide clarity and reproducibility of the finished result first

watchReason.zh: 礼品和家居逻辑成立，但仍需验证新手完成率与运输稳定性
watchReason.en: Gift and home logic are promising, but beginner completion rate and shipping stability still need validation

region.zh: 英国 / 德国 / 法国 / 意大利

title.zh: 欧洲穿戴甲市场机会分析

summary.zh: 欧洲穿戴甲机会成立，但更偏日常审美、可重复佩戴与规范化运营，不适合直接照搬美国式夸张爆款路径。
summary.en: Europe offers a real press-on nail opportunity, but it leans toward daily aesthetics, reusable wear, and compliance-led execution rather than direct copies of US-style dramatic trend plays.

highlight.zh: 先做 clean aesthetic，再做主题扩张
highlight.en: Build around clean aesthetics before themed expansion

recommendedActions.zh: 先用英国和德国做 clean aesthetic 基础款测试
recommendedActions.en: Use the UK and Germany to test clean-aesthetic starter lines first

recommendedActions.zh: 同步梳理合规、标签和责任主体准备
recommendedActions.en: Map compliance, labeling, and responsible-person setup in parallel

watchReason.zh: 区域机会明确，但国家差异和合规变量仍需持续跟踪
watchReason.en: Regional potential is clear, but country variation and compliance variables still need continued tracking
